top_signals.title: Donald Trump Jr.-backed 'Steroid Olympics' are happening on Sunday. Here's what to expect
top_signals.summary: Olympic medallists are among 42 athletes competing in the controversial competition, but the Enhanced Games has big product plans beyond the event this weekend.
